runs.note: Fixed the critical bug where validateToken had inverted logic (throwing when token WAS found instead of when NOT found), implemented cryptographically secure token generation using crypto.randomBytes(32), added 15-minute token expiration checking, made tokens single-use by marking them as used after password reset, and added session invalidation on password reset to address all security review findings.
